data.body:
## Adversarial Review Findings Applied

### Done Definition Update: Clarify validate.sh scope for templates
validate.sh currently hardcodes make commands for the host project. A freshly-installed template may not have these targets. Clarify: does validate.sh run against the template's own test suite, or only the DSO infrastructure (hooks, ticket system)? If the former, validate.sh --ci must be configured for the template's commands via dso-config.conf.
